# Supplied

> The end-to-end packaging partner for fast-growing ecommerce brands.

Supplied is a UK-based packaging consultancy that partners with fast-growing consumer brands to design, source, and deliver sustainable packaging. We manage the full packaging lifecycle — from structural design and global sourcing to production, compliance, and logistics — so brands can scale without packaging becoming a bottleneck.

We work with ecommerce, DTC, health, wellness, and beauty brands. Based in London and Warsaw, manufacturing across 12 countries with 30+ vetted suppliers.

## What We Do

- **Packaging Strategy**: Cost-reduction audits, material innovation, portfolio reviews
- **Structural & Technical Design**: Dieline engineering, 3D mockups, unboxing solutions
- **Manufacturing & Global Sourcing**: 30+ vetted suppliers across 12 countries, matched by quality, cost, lead time, and sustainability
- **Artwork & Pre-Press**: Print-ready artwork, colour management, pre-press QA
- **QA & Compliance**: Factory audits, sample management, PPWR and FSC sustainability compliance
- **Logistics & Freight**: Freight, customs, warehousing from factory to fulfilment centre

## Products

We offer a full range of custom sustainable packaging:

- [Custom Mailer Boxes](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/mailer-boxes): Full-colour printed mailer boxes for ecommerce, inside and outside print
- [Custom Rigid Boxes](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/rigid-boxes): Luxury rigid boxes for health, beauty, and wellness with magnetic closures and lift-off lids
- [Custom Advent Calendars](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/advent-calendars): Bespoke printed advent calendars for beauty, wellness, and food brands
- [Custom Tissue Paper](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/tissue-paper): Custom printed tissue paper with logos, colours, and patterns on FSC-certified stock
- [Custom Paper Tubes](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/printed-tubes): Sustainable paper tubes for wellness, supplements, and beauty products
- [Custom Packing Tape](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/packing-tape): Plastic-free, recyclable branded paper tape
- [Custom Paper Mailers](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/paper-mailers): Plastic-free paper mailers as an alternative to poly mailers
- [Printed Shipping Boxes](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/shipping-boxes): Custom branded 0201 shipping boxes in flexo or digital print
- [Custom Cartonboard Boxes](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/cartonboard-boxes): Retail-ready folding cartons for beauty, healthcare, food, and wellness
- [Digitally Printed Cans](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/printed-cans): Short-run digitally printed aluminium cans for beer, RTD, and beverages
- [Custom Stickers & Labels](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/products/stickers-labels): Branded stickers and labels for product packaging and shipping

## Client Stories

- [Healf](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/client-stories/healf): Built the packaging infrastructure behind Healf's 434% growth year, managing 10-15 SKUs across structured EU production
- [Spacegoods](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/client-stories/spacegoods): From a single mailer box to managing 10+ SKUs across D2C and Tesco retail packaging
- [Glaize x Aston Martin](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/client-stories/glaize-x-aston-martin): Limited-edition collaboration delivered in 3.5 weeks with precision colour matching and zero delays
- [TRIP](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/client-stories/trip): Halved packaging lead times by transitioning tube production from China to Europe
- [Glow For It](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/client-stories/glow-for-it): Premium influencer packaging from brief to finished order in 20 days
- [Uncle Matt's Hats](https://www.suppliedpackaging.com/client-stories/uncle-matts-hats): Custom ice cream tub hat packaging designed and built from scratch

## Key Stats

- 30+ global suppliers
- 12 manufacturing countries
- 98% on-time delivery
- 23% average cost saving for clients
